channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Podcast: Brain-computer interface controls exoskeleton
item.description: Payam Heydari discusses a brain-computer interface that controls a robotic exoskeleton, potentially transforming lives of people with paralysis.

item.title: FDA-approved drug may boost immunotherapy for rare liver cancer
item.description: Researchers found that a rare liver cancer evades immunotherapy by trapping immune T cells in fibrous tissue, suggesting a potential drug solution.

item.title: NASA's Lucy spacecraft discovers a wobbling peanut-shaped asteroid with traces of ancient water
item.description: NASA's Lucy spacecraft found that asteroid Donaldjohanson is a wobbling, peanut-shaped object formed by a violent collision and slowly reshaped over time.

item.title: Common vitamin deficiency can mimic signs of normal aging
item.description: Vitamin B12 is needed in tiny amounts, but a deficiency can significantly impact health and energy. The vitamin was first linked to a life-saving treatment.
